basic_details.job_title: SIDBI SO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Specialist Officers Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI)
basic_details.short_information: The Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI) has officially announced the Specialist Officers Recruitment 2026 with 5 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. 01/2026-27 at sidbi.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 35 to 55 years (post-wise) and hold qualifications such as Master’s Degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Public Policy, Development Studies, Data Science, IT, Computer Science, Law, Cybersecurity, Management, or related disciplines can now submit their email applications up to 29 May 2026. Direct links to download the notifi

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Impact Assessment Analyst, Max 40 years for Senior Program Designer, Consent Manager, Data Auditor, Max 55 years for Chief Data and Analytics Officer.
age_limit.details: Impact Assessment Analyst (IAA): Maximum 35 years Senior Program Designer (SPD): Maximum 40 years Consent Manager (CM): Maximum 40 years Data Auditor (DA): Maximum 40 years Chief Data and Analytics Officer (CDAO): Maximum 55 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Public Policy, Development Studies, Data Science, Information Technology, Computer Science, Law, Data Governance, Business Administration, Cybersecurity, or related quantitative/analytical discipline.
qualification.details: Impact Assessment Analyst (IAA): Master's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics/ Statistics/ Public Policy/ Development Studies/ Data Science or related quantitative/analytical discipline. Certifications or coursework in impact evaluation, data analytics, econometrics or development economics (Desirable). Minimum 5 years of experience in impact measurement, analytics, consulting, development sector or DFI roles. Senior Program Designer (SPD): Master's degree in public policy/ economics/ development studies/ management or related field. Exposure to development finance, program design, or public systems design; certifications in policy, strategy or development programs (Desirable). Minimum 10 years of experience in program design, strategy, consulting, development sector or DFI roles. Consent Manager (CM): Graduate degree in Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Law/ Data Governance/Business Administration. Postgraduate degree in Law, Data Privacy, IT, or Management (Desirable). Certifications such as CIPP/A, CIPP/E, CIPM, DCPP, DCPLA or equivalent privacy/data governance certifications (Desirable). Overall 10 years of experience in managing IT Applications / Information risks out of which at least 4 years of relevant experience in data privacy, IT audit, risk/compliance, or data governance roles, preferably in banks, NBFCs, DFIs, fintechs, or regulated environments and 2 years of experiences in handling Information security risk. Data Auditor (DA): Graduate degree in Information Technology/ Computer Science/Data Science/ Law/ Risk Management. Postgraduate degree in Cybersecurity, Data Privacy, Law (LLB/LLM), or Data Governance (Desirable). Certifications such as CIPP/E, CIPP/A, CIPM, DCPP/DCPLA/ ISO 27001 Lead Auditor, CISA or equivalent (Desirable). Overall 10 years of relevant experience in data privacy, IT audit, risk/compliance, or data governance roles, preferably in banks, NBFCs, DFIs, fintechs, or regulated environments including at least 5 years in IT Auditing. Chief Data and Analytics Officer (CDAO): Graduate degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Finance, Management, or related quantitative/technical discipline AND Post-graduate degree such as M.Tech, M.Stat, M.Sc (Data Science/Analytics), or equivalent. Certifications in data management, analytics, AI/ML, information management or governance (Desirable). Overall, 18+ years of experience in financial services / consulting / technology, with at least 8+ years in senior leadership roles driving data, analytics or digital transformation.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹17.00 Lakh per annum to ₹85.00-₹95.00 Lakh per annum

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SIDBI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SIDBI Specialist Officer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the SIDBI Specialist Officer recruitment is May 29, 2026. Ensure your application reaches the bank before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Specialist Officers at SIDBI?
faq.answer: SIDBI has announced a total of 5 vacancies for the Specialist Officer positions. These vacancies are distributed across various specialized roles within the bank.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for SIDBI Specialist Officer posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification generally requires a Master's degree in disciplines like Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Data Science, IT, Law, or Business Administration, depending on the specific post. Some roles may also accept a graduate degree.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to SIDBI Specialist Officer roles?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post. It ranges from a maximum of 35 years for Impact Assessment Analyst to 55 years for Chief Data and Analytics Officer. Specific age limits apply to Senior Program Designer, Consent Manager, and Data Auditor roles.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for SIDBI Specialist Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process involves sending a duly filled application form along with your Curriculum Vitae via email to the designated recruitment email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for SIDBI Specialist Officer positions?
faq.answer: The salary is quite attractive, with CTCs ranging from approximately ₹17.00 Lakh per annum for the Impact Assessment Analyst to ₹85.00-₹95.00 Lakh per annum for the Chief Data and Analytics Officer, along with a variable component and other facilities.

faq.question: Q7. What are the different posts available under SIDBI Specialist Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Impact Assessment Analyst (IAA), Senior Program Designer (SPD), Consent Manager (CM), Data Auditor (DA), and Chief Data and Analytics Officer (CDAO).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these SIDBI Specialist Officer roles?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by a personal interview. The bank will assess candidates based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for SIDBI Specialist Officer posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for these Specialist Officer positions. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is required for these roles?
faq.answer: Experience requirements vary significantly by post, ranging from a minimum of 5 years for Impact Assessment Analyst to over 18 years for Chief Data and Analytics Officer, with specific years of experience in relevant fields like data privacy, IT audit, program design, or analytics.
